diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy of memory types from fastest to slowest, with their typical sizes and access times
diagrams.purpose: Understanding tradeoff between speed and capacity in memory systems

diagrams.title: Address Translation Process
diagrams.description: Shows how logical address is translated to physical address using MMU
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how virtual addresses map to physical memory locations

diagrams.title: Contiguous Memory Allocation
diagrams.description: Shows memory divided into partitions for multiple processes with holes between them
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing external fragmentation in contiguous allocation schemes
